author: gb9t
content:
Phase C /loop iter 5 (2026-05-09): 2 Tier-3 docs (VFS sweep cont'd).

fs/vfs/super.md (215 lines, 14 REQ / 12 AC, 0 open) — struct super_block + super_operations vtable + filesystem_type registration + sb lifecycle (sget → kill_sb) + freeze/thaw + libfs helpers + per-sb shrinker. Statfs UAPI byte-identity, /proc/filesystems format-identity, mount-flag SB_*/MS_* numeric byte-identity.

fs/vfs/file-table.md (262 lines, 15 REQ / 12 AC, 1 open Q1 about default O_CLOEXEC for legacy syscalls) — struct file + struct fdtable + struct files_struct + file_operations + fd alloc/free + close-on-exec + close_range + dup family + fcntl operation set. /proc/<pid>/fd/* + /proc/<pid>/fdinfo/* format-identity. Owns mandatory L3 'every fd is either NULL or points to a file with refcount ≥ 1' invariant from fs/00-overview.md.

Total .design/ docs: 49.
